text:
CY

The Paris Olympics began on Friday with a spectacular opening ceremony featuring teams floating down the River Seine.

Billionaires and celebrities from around the globe have flocked to Paris for the Olympics. The Paris 2024 Games officially began on Friday with a spectacular opening ceremony featuring Olympic teams floating down the River Seine, performances by Lady Gaga and Celine Dion, a laser show illuminating the Eiffel Tower, and the Olympic torch-bearer running across the city’s rooftops.

The opening ceremony attracted Hollywood and Bollywood celebrities, some of the world’s most influential business families, top athletes, and more.

Reliance Industries billionaire Mukesh Ambani, his wife Nita Ambani, and their daughter Isha Ambani were photographed at the opening ceremony. Nita Ambani, chairperson of the Reliance Foundation, was unanimously re-elected as a member of the International Olympic Committee from India during the IOC’s 142nd session.



Courtesy: @manishmalhotra

Tesla billionaire Elon Musk, the world’s richest person, is also in Paris for the Olympics. After being seen with IOC member Luis Mejía Oviedo, Musk shared images of the Eiffel Tower lit up for the event, posting, “The Olympics laser show was amazing!”



Courtesy: X

Delta CEO Ed Bastian was seen in Paris before the Olympics opening ceremony. His presence raised eyebrows as it coincided with Delta's struggles with thousands of flight cancellations, leaving an estimated half-a-million travelers stranded.

Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon is in Paris for the Olympics, according to the New York Post. He arrived in the city on the company’s private jet earlier this week.

LVMH billionaire and the world’s third richest person, Bernard Arnault, is also participating in the Olympics. His company is sponsoring the event, marking the first time a luxury brand has been an Olympic sponsor.

title: Billionaires at Olympics 2024: Elon Musk, Ambani, Bernard Arnault and others
author: Pop Culture & Art
description: The Paris Olympics began on Friday with a spectacular opening ceremony featuring teams floating down the River Seine.
keywords: Paris 2024 Olympics, opening ceremony, billionaires, celebrities, Mukesh Ambani, Nita Ambani, Isha Ambani, Elon Musk, Ed Bastian, David Solomon, Bernard Arnault, Reliance Industries, Tesla, Delta Airlines, Goldman Sachs, LVMH, Lady Gaga, Celine Dion, River Seine, Eiffel Tower, Olympic torch-bearer, Hollywood, Bollywood
